title: Intellect
content:
Go, speed the stars of Thought
    On to their shining goals;--
    The sower scatters broad his seed;
    The wheat thou strew'st be souls.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Intellect"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
